results.rendered_html:
ādhvaryava (von adhvaryu)
1〉 adj. zum Adhvaryu (d. i.  YAJURVEDA ) in Beziehung stehend  P. 4,3,123 . yadi vādhvaryavaṃ rājā niyunakti purohitam  AV.   PARIŚIṢṬA 1 _in_ Ind. St. 1,296,13 .
— 2〉 n. der Dienst beim Opfer; spec. die Function des Adhvaryu gaṇa udgātrādi zu  P. 5,1,129 . aharaharaśvinādhvaryavaṃ vām  ṚV. 10,52,2 .  VS. 28,19 . ṛgvedenaiva hautramakurvata yajurve denādhvaryavaṃ sāmavedenodgītham  ŚAT. BR. 11,5,8,4 .  AIT. BR. 5,33 .  KĀTY. ŚR. 9,8,9 . 23,5,33 . 24,4,42 . 25,1,6 .  NIR. 7,3 .  MADHUS. _in_ Ind. St. 1,16,8 . 18,2 .

results.rendered_html:
ādhvaryava a. (vī f.) [adhvaryoḥ idaṃ añ]
1 Belonging to the adhvaryu (q. v.) or to the Yajur-veda.
2 One conversant with the Yajurveda; (  P. IV. 3. 123 ).
— vaṃ
1 Service at a sacrifice.
2 Particularly, the office of an Adhvaryu priest.
